# Alejandro Moreno Martín

Role: Product Designer
Location: Madrid, Spain
Status: Open for opportunities
Contact: alejandromorenomartin1990@gmail.com
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/alejandromorenoproductdesigner/
GitHub: https://github.com/AlejandroMorenoMartin

## About

Product Designer specializing in AI systems and design engineering. Focused on understanding how AI changes product design — not just as a tool, but as a user and decision-maker. Working remotely from Madrid, open to projects and collaborations.

## Skills

- Product strategy: hypothesis validation, funnel architecture, AAA accessibility audits
- Design engineering: design tokens, Storybook, React, Swift, high-fidelity sandboxes
- AI orchestration: non-deterministic flow design, MCP (Model Context Protocol) integration, LLM-driven design automation

## Languages

- Spanish: Native
- English: Professional

## Projects

- AMM_OS.app: UX validation framework. Impact: -60% design-to-production lead time.
- SENZO.studio: VFX portfolio platform. Impact: +25% qualified leads.
- CASA_DEL_AIRE.io: Direct booking platform. Impact: +20% direct booking ratio.
- SAZON.app: Culinary social platform. Impact: +30% weekly recurrence.
- FORMA.app: Biometric monitoring app. Impact: +40% cognitive load reduction.
